def negative_generator_close_exception_not_handled_when_cleanup_required():
    rule_id = "generator_close_exception_not_handled_when_cleanup_required"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Generator or context manager performs resource acquisition in a finally block without a try/finally guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
